name: Ayesha Khan (Indian actress)
profileSummary: Ayesha Khan is an Indian actress who works in Telugu and Hindi films. She is well known from Bigg Boss Season 17, debuted in TV series with, Baalveer Returns (2019). Ayesha later made her film debut in Telugu with Mukhachitram (2022) and also starred in Om Bheem Bush (2024) and Manamey (2024). She also received recognition and praise for her dance in song "Shararat" in the 2025 film Dhurandhar. She also starred alongside Kapil Sharma in the film Kis Kisko Pyaar Karoon 2 in 2025.
